description.s: function for loading code items as ES modules. Handles module caching, invalidation, and circular dependency detection.
: Modules cached by ID with timestamp; automatically invalidated when item's
: Tracks call stack during load, throws descriptive error if cycle detected
: Code items compiled to ES modules via blob URLs with sourceURL for debugging
: WeakMap tracking which item each loaded module came from (

const module = await api.require('library-name');
const cached = kernel.moduleSystem.getCached('library-name'); // sync, returns null if not loaded
kernel.moduleSystem.getModuleInfo(moduleObj); // { itemId, itemName } or null
await api.typeChainIncludes(typeId, targetId); // check inheritance
and re-thrown with context. The original stack trace is preserved for debugging.
— Timestamp-based caching, event-driven invalidation, loading promise deduplication
— ES module evaluation, blob URLs, strict mode

ModuleSystem.name: ModuleSystem
ModuleSystem.description: Module system — loads code items as ES modules with caching and circular dependency detection.

ModuleSystem.initEventListeners.name: initEventListeners
ModuleSystem.initEventListeners.description: Initialize event listeners for cache invalidation on item updates.

ModuleSystem.require.name: require
ModuleSystem.require.description: Load a code item as an ES module by name or ID. Caches results.

params.name: callStack
params.description: Internal: tracks loading chain for circular dependency detection

ModuleSystem.evaluateCodeItem.name: evaluateCodeItem
ModuleSystem.evaluateCodeItem.description: Compile and execute a code item as an ES module via blob URL.

ModuleSystem.isCodeItem.name: isCodeItem
ModuleSystem.isCodeItem.description: Check if an item is a code item (type chain includes CODE).

ModuleSystem.buildExtendsChain.name: buildExtendsChain
ModuleSystem.buildExtendsChain.description:
Build the extends chain for a type (from the given type up to ITEM root).
Falls back to walking 'type' field if 'extends' is not present.

returns.description: Array of type GUIDs in chain order

ModuleSystem.typeChainIncludes.name: typeChainIncludes
ModuleSystem.typeChainIncludes.description: Check if a type's extends chain includes a target type.

params.name: targetId
params.description: The target type to look for

ModuleSystem.getCached.name: getCached
ModuleSystem.getCached.description:
Get a cached module synchronously (returns null if not cached).
Use for synchronous code paths that can't await require().

ModuleSystem.getModuleInfo.name: getModuleInfo
ModuleSystem.getModuleInfo.description: Get metadata (itemId, itemName) for a loaded module object.

params.name: obj
params.description: A module object returned by require()

ModuleSystem.clearCache.name: clearCache
ModuleSystem.clearCache.description: Clear all module and name caches (forces fresh evaluation on next require).
